results.title: Toronto Blue Jays vs New York Yankees: Betting Preview
results.summary: The moneyline and run line odds align perfectly with the source data, but the article includes a game total and pitcher details not found in the dataset.

issues.explanation: The source data for the Blue Jays vs. Yankees game does not include a 'Total' or Over/Under line.

issues.claim: home matchup against a left-handed starter

results.title: CFL Preview: BC Lions at Saskatchewan Roughriders
results.summary: The article includes a point total not present in the source data and lists a point spread that differs slightly from the source value.

issues.explanation: The source data for the BC Lions at Saskatchewan Roughriders game does not provide a point total (over/under) line.
The source data lists the point spread for Saskatchewan as -2, while the article lists it as -2.5.

results.title: Hamilton Stuns Winnipeg with 37-27 Victory in Battle of the Prairie
results.summary: The article's core facts, including the final score, winner, team names, and game date, are fully supported by the source data.

results.title: Mexico vs Argentina: A World Cup 2026 Knockout Preview
Calgary Stampeders vs. Saskatchewan Roughriders: A Battle for Rivalry and Position
Mexico Faces South Africa in World Cup Opener: Betting Preview and Takeaway
results.summary: The article correctly reports the primary moneyline odds but contains a high-severity date error for the Argentina fixture and cites betting lines not present in the source data.

issues.claim: Argentina will face Algeria on Monday, June 15.
issues.source: The latest_odds entry for ARGENTINA vs ALGERIA lists the startTime as '2026-06-17T03:00:00.000Z'.
issues.explanation: The source data schedules the match for June 17 (Wednesday), contradicting the article's claim of Monday, June 15.

issues.claim: the over/under for the match is set at 2 goals
issues.source: The latest_odds data for MEXICO vs SOUTH AFRICA only provides moneyline odds (homeOdds: -333, awayOdds: 600).
issues.explanation: The source data does not contain over/under or total goal lines; this claim is unsupported by the provided data.

results.title: Royals vs Rangers Preview: A Value Play in the MLB Odds
results.summary: REMOVED: The article contradicts the source data regarding the game date and incorrectly identifies the Rangers as the favored team.

issues.claim: The Kansas City Royals and Texas Rangers face off tonight [June 12, 2026].
issues.source: latest_odds: KC ROYALS vs TEX RANGERS startTime is '2026-06-11T20:10:00.000Z'.
issues.explanation: The source data shows the game was scheduled for June 11, but the article (published June 12) claims the game is taking place 'tonight'.

issues.claim: While the Rangers are favored by the spread...
issues.source: latest_odds: KC ROYALS (home) vs TEX RANGERS (away) has a spread of -0.5.
issues.explanation: A -0.5 spread is assigned to the Royals in the source data, making them the favorite, whereas the article incorrectly states the Rangers are favored.

issues.claim: The Rangers are priced at +145... This suggests that the market sees the Rangers as having a slight edge.
issues.explanation: In betting, higher positive odds indicate an underdog. The article incorrectly interprets the Rangers' +145 odds as having an 'edge' over the Royals' +130.

issues.claim: The over-under for this game is set at 10.5 runs.
issues.source: latest_odds data for Royals vs Rangers.
issues.explanation: The source data does not provide any over-under or total runs information for this matchup.
